NAVAREA XIX 93/15
M/V WESTERN  TRIDENT CONDUCTING SEISMIC SURVEY IN THE FOLLOWING POSITION:

A. 66-47 N  009-14 E
B. 65-48 N  009-14 E
C. 65-48 N  007-37 E
D. 66-47 N  007-37 E

TOWING 12 X 7300M CABLES.
GUARD VESSELS SHANNON AND BRAVO SAPPHIRE IN ATTENDANCE. 
WIDE BERTH REQUESTED: 3NM AHEAD, 3NM ABEAM AND 6NM ASTERN.
     NORMAL   0         21         FALSE   FALSE   FALSE      NO-BOK   X-NONE   _X-NONE_                                                     MICROSOFTINTERNETEXPLORER4                                                                                                                               <W:LSDEXCEPTION LOCKED="FALSE" PRIORITY="20" SEMIHIDDEN="FALSE"    UNHIDEWHENUSED="FALSE" QFORMAT="TRUE
